scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "PORT=43778 npm run dev -w server" "node scripts/wait-for-api.mjs http://localhost:43778/api/health && VITE_API_PORT=43778 npm run dev -w client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.root.json
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
